About Me

AI Decision Science & Supply Chain Analytics

I'm a Supply Chain Data science engineer at Accenture - Strategy & Consulting, where I build machine learning models for demand forecasting and analytics solutions that drive operational efficiency across global supply chains.

With a background in Electronics & Communication Engineering from Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, I combine technical depth with business understanding to solve complex supply chain problems.

Experience

AI Decision Science Analyst

Accenture – Strategy & Consulting

March 2026 – Present · Gurugram

// Decision Intelligence

  • Built automated seasonal loss prevention system monitoring 500+ SKUs daily across 9+ manufacturing plants for a leading CPG client
  • Designed stateful Python production cut engine — handles MOQ, incremental quantity, and multi-week inventory validation in a single pass
  • Engineered full ETL pipeline across Exasol integrating ERP and supply planning systems with daily recommendation snapshotting
  • Projected $3–5M annual benefit against a $19M+ seasonal waste problem

Senior Executive, Worldwide Supply Chain (Data Science & Analytics)

Becton Dickinson

June 2023 – March 2026 · Remote

// Demand Forecasting

  • Implemented ML models (XGBoost, Holtz Winter, LightGBM) achieving 5% increase in forecast accuracy
  • Built scalable pipeline for monthly training/forecasting of 50,000+ SKUs
  • Developed backtesting frameworks achieving 93% adoption rate of AI-ML forecasts
  • Trained 100+ demand planners and handled 100+ feedback tool queries

// Supply Analytics — Solutions Architect

  • Designed WIMO (Where Is My Order) dashboard for end-to-end order tracking
  • Created 3 executive dashboards, reducing distribution backorders by 60%
  • Developed MAVA tool, removing 200+ SKUs from manual allocation
  • Built Order Sensing tool to flag abnormal transaction trends
